title: Telling Europe’s sportings Stories through the My Sporting Heritage Project
content:
The My Sporting Heritage project, funded by the Erasmus+ Sport programme, is dedicated to the study, valorisation, and dissemination of Europe’s sporting heritage. Launched in 2024 and scheduled to run until the end of 2026, the project aims to identify, preserve, and promote a cultural heritage linked to sport that, despite being rich and widespread throughout Europe, remains little known to the general public.

The concept of “sporting heritage” encompasses both the tangible aspects of sport—such as objects, equipment, archives, museums, and historical sites—and the intangible aspects, such as sporting traditions, physical practices, values, and collective memories linked to European sporting culture. creator: Michael Culture
sourceDescription: EUROPEAN TRANS-DOMAIN NETWORK FOR DIGITAL CULTURAL HERITAGE AND RELATED COMMUNITIES
